items.headline: Is Albemarle (ALB) One of the 10 Dividend Stocks with Low Payout Ratios and Strong Upside Potential?
items.snippet: On June 18, Citi upgraded Albemarle Corporation (NYSE:ALB) to Buy from Neutral. It kept its price target unchanged at $225. Analyst Patrick Cunningham said the company is well-positioned to benefit from structural lithium demand tailwinds.

items.headline: Energy storage demand grows 40% annually, lithium producers bet on growth drivers beyond electric vehicles
items.snippet: Albemarle (ALB.US), the world's largest lithium producer, also noted that demand for its energy storage business is steadily growing, contrasting with the irregularity of demand from electric vehicles.

items.headline: Albemarle Likely to Continue Growing Volumes Over the Coming Years, RBC Says
items.snippet: RBC stated it now expects 2026 and 2027 EBITDA of $2.8 billion and $2.9 billion respectively. Reiterated Outperform rating and boosted price target to $257 per share from $253.
